parameters.subject: Your AI Readiness Report is here 📊

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-20250514",
  "max_tokens": 1500,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "You are an expert AI business consultant producing a professional audit report.

BUSINESS PROFILE:
- Company: {{ $('Receive Audit Submission').item.json.body.bizName }}
- Industry: {{ $('Receive Audit Submission').item.json.body.bizIndustry }}
- Size: {{ $('Receive Audit Submission').item.json.body.bizSize }}
- Revenue: {{ $('Receive Audit Submission').item.json.body.bizRevenue }}
- Biggest challenge: {{ $('Receive Audit Submission').item.json.body.bizChallenge }}

AUDIT SCORES:
Overall AI Readiness: {{ $('Receive Audit Submission').item.json.body.totalScore }}/100 ({{ $('Receive Audit Submission').item.json.body.tier }})

Category Scores:
- Operations & Workflows: {{ $('Receive Audit Submission').item.json.body.scores.operations }}%
- Sales & Lead Management: {{ $('Receive Audit Submission').item.json.body.scores.sales }}%
- Customer Experience: {{ $('Receive Audit Submission').item.json.body.scores.customer }}%
- Marketing & Content: {{ $('Receive Audit Submission').item.json.body.scores.marketing }}%
- Strategy & AI Readiness: {{ $('Receive Audit Submission').item.json.body.scores.strategy }}%

Detailed Answers:
{{ $('Receive Audit Submission').item.json.body.answersSummary }}

Produce the following sections. Be specific, direct, and reference their industry and challenge.

FORMAT EXACTLY AS:

[EXECUTIVE_SUMMARY]
3-4 sentences on AI readiness, current stage, and single biggest opportunity. Honest, not generic.

[STRENGTHS_GAPS]
Strengths (2-3 bullet points starting with checkmark):
Gaps (2-3 bullet points starting with x mark):

[ACTION_PLAN]
Exactly 5 priority actions:
PRIORITY|TITLE|DESCRIPTION|TAG
PRIORITY = HIGH, MED, or LOW. TITLE = max 8 words. DESCRIPTION = 1-2 sentences. TAG = Quick Win | 30 Days | 90 Days | Strategic

[QUICK_WINS]
3 specific things they can implement THIS WEEK with zero budget. Numbered. Concrete and specific to their industry."
    }
  ]
}
